data.title: Circle K offers 40 cents/gallon discount on Jan. 15 to Inner Circle members in 29 states to ease holiday spending.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - Convenience store chain Circle K is providing members of its Inner Circle loyalty program with a discount of 40 cents per gallon on January 15. This offer is available in 29 states and aims to assist customers in recuperating from their holiday expenses.

data.title: Earnings for Sify Technologies (NASDAQ: SIFY) on Jan 12, 2026 expected to report quarterly loss at $0.01 per share.
data.description: Sify Technologies (NASDAQ: SIFY) is expected to announce a quarterly loss of $0.01 per share before the bell today. Stay tuned for updates on the actual revenue numbers. For more detailed information, you can read the full story on an external financial news website.
ITALY'S FOREIGN MINISTER: ITALY, THROUGH ENI, WANTS TO BE A KEY PLAYER IN VENEZUELA'S ENERGY INDUSTRY

data.title: Hawaii School Expo on Jan. 25 at Bernice Pauahi Bishop Museum to help parents find new schools for kids. Free event.
data.description: Residents of Honolulu looking to explore educational options for their children can participate in a complimentary event on Sunday, January 25th. The Hawaii School Expo, commencing at 11:00 am at the Bernice Pauahi Bishop Museum, offers parents an opportunity to discover various schooling alternatives in the area.

data.title: QXO increases equity placement to $3 billion led by Apollo Global Management; total investment now $3 billion.
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut, QXO, Inc. (NYSE: QXO) disclosed a significant financial development. The company announced a hefty increase of $1.8 billion to its existing $1.2 billion financing. This boost was spearheaded by funds managed by affiliates of Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO), resulting in a total investment of $3 billion in QXO. Investors involved in this infusion include Apollo, Temasek, and other parties, who will be contributing through a series of convertible perpetual preferred stock known as the "Series C Prefe..."
FORMER CONSERVATIVE MINISTER NADIM ZAHAWI DEFECTS TO NIGEL FARAGE'S REFORM UK PARTY

data.title: Employee reluctance over RTO declines sharply from 51% to 7%, reflecting employer control and on-site work acceptance in 2026.
data.description: Within a span of one year, the percentage of employees who are open to quitting their jobs due to mandates requiring a return to the office decreased significantly from 51% to 7%. This shift indicates a notable increase in employer authority and a growing acknowledgement of the importance of on-site work. The data comes from a report based in GUAYNABO, Puerto Rico, released on January 12, 2026, which highlights this shifting trend in the workforce.

data.title: Savers Value Village, Inc. preannounced preliminary net sales for Q4 and full 2025, citing 53rd week impact. Participating in ICR conference.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, Savers Value Village, Inc. (NYSE: SVV) revealed its initial net sales figures for the fourteen weeks concluding on January 3, 2026 (Q4) and the fifty-three weeks ending on January 3, 2026 (fiscal year 2025). The Company shared these results as part of its involvement in the ICR Conference held from January 12-14, 2026. The reported results for both Q4 and fiscal year 2025 were influenced by an extra week known as the "53rd week."

data.title: e.l.f. Cosmetics and Liquid Death team up for limited-edition "Lip Embalms" in a new collab after their successful Corpse Paint launch.
data.description: A collaboration between e.l.f. Cosmetics and Liquid Death is set to shake things up again as they release the limited-edition "e.l.f. x Liquid Death Lip Embalms." This partnership, between e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF) and the healthy beverage platform, follows their successful Corpse Paint makeup vault launch. This unexpected collaboration made waves in the beauty and beverage sectors. The new Lip Embalms are the next step in their partnership, bringing a unique and edgy product to consumers.

data.title: Seagate ships 32TB capacities globally to partners, showcasing AI-driven storage solutions at Intersec 2026.
data.description: In Dubai, Seagate Technology plc (NASDAQ: STX), a key player in large-capacity data storage, is presenting cutting-edge storage solutions at Intersec 2026. These solutions aid in the advancement of AI-fueled video analysis into actionable insights. Their range of products, from edge to cloud, enables companies to maximize data utilization and improve decision-making processes rapidly. The inclusion of AI in video image analytics (VIA) is driving unparalleled advancements.

data.title: MedaSystems had a successful year with accelerated customer growth, clinical adoption, and platform expansion.
data.description: A company based in Menlo Park, California, MedaSystems, has reported a successful year marked by substantial customer expansion, increased clinical utilization, and notable progress in regulatory compliance and artificial intelligence integration. Serving as a top Software as a Service (SaaS) platform for Expanded Access, Post Trial Access, and Investigator Initiated Studies, they have solidified their position as a reliable ally for life sciences firms and healthcare providers in finding treatment options for patients with pressing medical conditions. This year has witnessed significant achievements in various areas, underlining MedaSystems' commitment to driving innovation and supporting the healthcare industry.

data.title: Jersey Mike's founder leads international expansion into UK and Ireland, plans to open 400 stores.
data.description: Peter Cancro, the founder of Jersey Mike's Subs, is set to spearhead the brand's expansion into Europe by opening 400 stores. Based in Manasquan, New Jersey, this move represents the Company's first foray into the European market. Known for its fresh and customizable fast-casual sandwiches, Jersey Mike's currently operates as a leading franchisor with a network of over 3,200 stores. The initiative towards European expansion under Cancro's leadership marks a significant milestone for the brand.

data.title: China Yuchai International acquires Equity of Nanyue Diankong (Hengyang) Industrial Technology on Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Singapore, China Yuchai International Limited (NYSE: CYD) announced its status as a leading powertrain solution provider through its primary subsidiary in China, Guangxi Yuchai Machinery Company Limited ("Yuchai"). China Yuchai is recognized for manufacturing powertrain solutions at a significant scale and is a key player in the industry.

data.title: First Abu Dhabi Bank and T. Rowe Price partner to enhance investment offering in GCC. FAB is one of the world's largest financial institutions.
data.description: Today, First Abu Dhabi Bank (FAB) in the UAE revealed a new strategic collaboration with T. Rowe Price, a distinguished global asset management company. FAB, known as one of the world's largest and most secure financial institutions, aims to strengthen its position further through this partnership.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. to sell manufacturing and supply rights for SmartDose® 3.5mL to AbbVie in a definitive agreement.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. revealed a deal to sell off all manufacturing and supply rights. West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a key player in providing innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, is listed on the NYSE under the symbol WST. The transaction marks a significant development for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: IFG forms President's Advisory Council in Jan. 2026 to enhance engagement and strategy, with 600 financial professionals.
data.description: A newly formed Council aims to influence strategy, boost advisor involvement, and drive common objectives. Located in San Diego and launched on Jan. 12, 2026, Independent Financial Group, LLC (IFG), a privately owned independent wealth management firm, supports over 600 financial professionals.

data.title: Lt. Gen Mary O'Brien joins Operation Homefront's National Board of Directors, a nonprofit serving military families.
data.description: In San Antonio on January 12, 2026, Operation Homefront, a prominent nonprofit organization supporting military families in the U.S., chose Lt. Gen Mary O'Brien, a retired USAF officer, as a strategic consultant in the field of national security and technology.
